{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Medical Sales Representative",
  "description": "Divine AG Solutions Limited (RC 1243335) was incorporated in 2015 to provide recruitment and outsourcing services in accordance with the terms agreed between us and our clients. Our goal is to meet the needs of our clients ranging from individual clients, government parastatals, corporate organizations, manufacturing companies, public sectors/organizations, hotels, churches as well as multinationals companies and corporations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative
Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Meet and Exceed territory sales target within agreed budgets and timelines
	Interface with and communicate effectively to customers and key influencers regarding product efficacy and safety, product availability, supply and distribution.
	Maintain key customer relationships and develop and implement strategies for expanding designated customer base in assigned territory.
	Identifying and establishing new business
	Lead the generation of demand for products in government and privately owned health facilities, retail facilities and relevant medical establishments.
	Maintaining detailed records
	Make presentations to healthcare professionals in Hospitals or Pharmacies.
	Analyze sales data to improve sales results
	Monitor competitor activity and products.
	Develop strategies for increasing opportunities to meet and talk to contacts in the healthcare sector.


Requirements


	A Degree in Biological Sciences or related courses.
	2 - 4 years of experience as a medical sales representative
	B.Pharm or Pharm D is an advantage.
	Must reside in Ibadan.
	Planning, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office.
	Excellent communication and Presentation skills.
	Customer relationship skills.
	Strong teamwork and networking skills.Ability to work under pressure.


Salary
N400,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;divineagsolutionsltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-19",

  },

Medical Sales Representative Job at Divine AG Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Divine AG Solutions Limited (RC 1243335) was incorporated in 2015 to provide recruitment and outsourcing services in accordance with the terms agreed between us and our clients. Our goal is to meet the needs of our clients ranging from individual clients, government parastatals, corporate organizations, manufacturing companies, public sectors/organizations, hotels, churches as well as multinationals companies and corporations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative
Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Meet and Exceed territory sales target within agreed budgets and timelines
	Interface with and communicate effectively to customers and key influencers regarding product efficacy and safety, product availability, supply and distribution.
	Maintain key customer relationships and develop and implement strategies for expanding designated customer base in assigned territory.
	Identifying and establishing new business
	Lead the generation of demand for products in government and privately owned health facilities, retail facilities and relevant medical establishments.
	Maintaining detailed records
	Make presentations to healthcare professionals in Hospitals or Pharmacies.
	Analyze sales data to improve sales results
	Monitor competitor activity and products.
	Develop strategies for increasing opportunities to meet and talk to contacts in the healthcare sector.


Requirements


	A Degree in Biological Sciences or related courses.
	2 - 4 years of experience as a medical sales representative
	B.Pharm or Pharm D is an advantage.
	Must reside in Ibadan.
	Planning, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office.
	Excellent communication and Presentation skills.
	Customer relationship skills.
	Strong teamwork and networking skills.Ability to work under pressure.


Salary
N400,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "SIAO Partners is a subsidiary of SIAO, an independent Nigerian professional services firm which boasts of a crop of seasoned professionals with local and international experience positioned to providing excellent Human Resource Consultancy services, financial advisory services, legal and compliance services, taxation and business assurance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Experienced Internal Auditor

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field with&nbsp;2&mdash;5 years of experience in audit, risk, or compliance
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, CIA) is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of internal control frameworks
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Strong analytical and reporting skills


Key Skills &amp; Competencies:


	High integrity and ethical standards
	Strong attention to detail
	Excellent communication skills
	Problem-solving ability
	Confidentiality and professionalism.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@siao-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Experienced Internal Auditor Job at SIAO Partners




        
    

        
        SIAO Partners is a subsidiary of SIAO, an independent Nigerian professional services firm which boasts of a crop of seasoned professionals with local and international experience positioned to providing excellent Human Resource Consultancy services, financial advisory services, legal and compliance services, taxation and business assurance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Internal Auditor

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field with 2—5 years of experience in audit, risk, or compliance
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, CIA) is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of internal control frameworks
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Strong analytical and reporting skills


Key Skills & Competencies:


	High integrity and ethical standards
	Strong attention to detail
	Excellent communication skills
	Problem-solving ability
	Confidentiality and professionalism.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Executive",
  "description": "Fadac Resources and Services&nbsp;Limited - We provide businesses with human capital solutions that can help improve oral performance while reducing employment practice risk.We can assist organization no matter how large or small to establish, outsource and trouble shoot any human resources functions/ challenges Our believe is that people are the greatest asset in the organization regardless of the business size, industry and market share. We provide the best professionals backed with solid years of experience and knowledge, and their job is to integrate solutions for your business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Locations:&nbsp;Cross River, Enugu &amp; Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Air Conditioning / HVAC Solutions

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven Sales Executive with 2 &ndash; 5 years experience to join a fast-growing company in the HVAC (air conditioning) industry.
	If you have a strong sales mindset and understand technical products, this opportunity is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of air conditioning and HVAC solutions to corporate and retail clients
	Identify and develop new business opportunities across target markets
	Build and maintain strong client relationships to ensure repeat business
	Conduct site visits and provide tailored product recommendations
	Prepare proposals, quotations, and close sales deals
	Collaborate with technical teams to ensure seamless installation and delivery
	Meet and exceed sales targets and performance KPIs.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in sales (HVAC, engineering, technical, or B2B sales preferred)
	Strong understanding of sales techniques and customer engagement
	Ability to understand technical products and explain them clearly
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send teir CV to:&nbsp;favour.a@fadacresources.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Sales Executive Job at Fadac Resources and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Fadac Resources and Services Limited - We provide businesses with human capital solutions that can help improve oral performance while reducing employment practice risk.We can assist organization no matter how large or small to establish, outsource and trouble shoot any human resources functions/ challenges Our believe is that people are the greatest asset in the organization regardless of the business size, industry and market share. We provide the best professionals backed with solid years of experience and knowledge, and their job is to integrate solutions for your business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Locations: Cross River, Enugu & Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Air Conditioning / HVAC Solutions

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven Sales Executive with 2 – 5 years experience to join a fast-growing company in the HVAC (air conditioning) industry.
	If you have a strong sales mindset and understand technical products, this opportunity is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of air conditioning and HVAC solutions to corporate and retail clients
	Identify and develop new business opportunities across target markets
	Build and maintain strong client relationships to ensure repeat business
	Conduct site visits and provide tailored product recommendations
	Prepare proposals, quotations, and close sales deals
	Collaborate with technical teams to ensure seamless installation and delivery
	Meet and exceed sales targets and performance KPIs.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or related field
	2–5 years of experience in sales (HVAC, engineering, technical, or B2B sales preferred)
	Strong understanding of sales techniques and customer engagement
	Ability to understand technical products and explain them clearly
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send teir CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Assistant",
  "description": "The Global Alliance for Improved Nutrition (GAIN) is a Swiss-based foundation launched at the UN in 2002 to tackle the human suffering caused by malnutrition. Working with both governments and businesses, we aim to transform food systems so that they deliver more nutritious food for all people. In particular, we aim to make healthier food choices more desirable, more available, and more affordable. GAIN&rsquo;s mission is to advance nutrition outcomes by improving consumption of nutritious and safe food for all people, especially the most vulnerable to malnutrition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Logistics Assistant
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	GAIN is seeking to recruit a Logistics Assistant to support day-to-day logistics operations, including transportation coordination, warehouse support, and delivery execution.
	They assist in processing and management of the procurement of goods and services, maintaining accurate records of procurement operations and maintaining positive relations with suppliers.
	This role will be offered on two (2) years fixed term contract, subject to securing the award and availability of funding and will be based in Abuja.&nbsp;
	GAIN encourages early applications and reserves the right to close the advert ahead of the advertised deadline if we receive a high volume of interest.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in planning and coordinating inbound and outbound movement of staff.
	Maintain accurate inventory records and update logistics databases.
	Complete Purchase Orders and ensure payments are processed for logistical services.
	Support in facilitating conferences and workshops and process payments and support the country office finance team as required.
	Support in conducting market surveys for procurement planning and budgeting.
	Support with asset management and verification of physical assets.
	Maintain accurate documentation systems and ensure that all procurements of goods are managed, tracked, and recorded in collaboration with Office Assistant.
	Coordinate airport transportation arrangements, including pickups and drop-offs, and manage the car transport services for travel both within and outside of Abuja.
	Support maintaining and update supplier information such as qualifications, supplier quality assessments, delivery times, product ranges, etc. and maintaining suppliers&rsquo; databases with catalogues of various products and prices.
	Support to prepare procurement documents, such as requests for quotations, bidding documents, evaluation reports, purchase orders and contract agreements for logistical services.
	Coordinate dispatch and delivery schedules with drivers and transport providers.
	Communicate daily with drivers regarding routes and schedules.
	Monitor vehicle usage, trip logs, and basic compliance checks.&nbsp;


About you


	The ideal candidate will bring hands-on experience in logistics and procurement within a structured, professional environment, along with a strong understanding of end-to-end supply chain processes.
	The candidate will contribute to procurement planning, market analysis, vendor due diligence, and the execution of transparent, competitive bidding processes.
	They will also support contract development and review, monitor commitments, and ensure efficient logistics operations. Experience working with international NGOs and familiarity with donor-funded projects particularly USAID or similar agencies is desirable.
	The candidate should be comfortable using procurement and inventory management systems (both off-the-shelf and custom-built), with the ability to leverage data for informed decision-making.
	They should have excellent communication and negotiating skills, organized, attentive to detail, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
	A collaborative mindset, flexibility, and the ability to build effective working relationships across teams are essential and proficiency in Microsoft Office tools is required.


Salary
N8,374,696 per annum.",

Logistics Assistant Job at the Global Alliance for Improved Nutrition (GAIN)




        
    

        
        The Global Alliance for Improved Nutrition (GAIN) is a Swiss-based foundation launched at the UN in 2002 to tackle the human suffering caused by malnutrition. Working with both governments and businesses, we aim to transform food systems so that they deliver more nutritious food for all people. In particular, we aim to make healthier food choices more desirable, more available, and more affordable. GAIN’s mission is to advance nutrition outcomes by improving consumption of nutritious and safe food for all people, especially the most vulnerable to malnutrition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	GAIN is seeking to recruit a Logistics Assistant to support day-to-day logistics operations, including transportation coordination, warehouse support, and delivery execution.
	They assist in processing and management of the procurement of goods and services, maintaining accurate records of procurement operations and maintaining positive relations with suppliers.
	This role will be offered on two (2) years fixed term contract, subject to securing the award and availability of funding and will be based in Abuja. 
	GAIN encourages early applications and reserves the right to close the advert ahead of the advertised deadline if we receive a high volume of interest.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in planning and coordinating inbound and outbound movement of staff.
	Maintain accurate inventory records and update logistics databases.
	Complete Purchase Orders and ensure payments are processed for logistical services.
	Support in facilitating conferences and workshops and process payments and support the country office finance team as required.
	Support in conducting market surveys for procurement planning and budgeting.
	Support with asset management and verification of physical assets.
	Maintain accurate documentation systems and ensure that all procurements of goods are managed, tracked, and recorded in collaboration with Office Assistant.
	Coordinate airport transportation arrangements, including pickups and drop-offs, and manage the car transport services for travel both within and outside of Abuja.
	Support maintaining and update supplier information such as qualifications, supplier quality assessments, delivery times, product ranges, etc. and maintaining suppliers’ databases with catalogues of various products and prices.
	Support to prepare procurement documents, such as requests for quotations, bidding documents, evaluation reports, purchase orders and contract agreements for logistical services.
	Coordinate dispatch and delivery schedules with drivers and transport providers.
	Communicate daily with drivers regarding routes and schedules.
	Monitor vehicle usage, trip logs, and basic compliance checks. 


About you


	The ideal candidate will bring hands-on experience in logistics and procurement within a structured, professional environment, along with a strong understanding of end-to-end supply chain processes.
	The candidate will contribute to procurement planning, market analysis, vendor due diligence, and the execution of transparent, competitive bidding processes.
	They will also support contract development and review, monitor commitments, and ensure efficient logistics operations. Experience working with international NGOs and familiarity with donor-funded projects particularly USAID or similar agencies is desirable.
	The candidate should be comfortable using procurement and inventory management systems (both off-the-shelf and custom-built), with the ability to leverage data for informed decision-making.
	They should have excellent communication and negotiating skills, organized, attentive to detail, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
	A collaborative mindset, flexibility, and the ability to build effective working relationships across teams are essential and proficiency in Microsoft Office tools is required.


Salary
N8,374,696 per annum.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist",
  "description": "Onyibiz Consult &amp; Insight is a business firm based in Lagos, Nigeria, that specializes inproviding services related to business consulting, project management, and marketing. They are focused on helping organizations with strategic business development, providing necessary insights to support operational success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Maryland, Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job brief


	We are looking for a Receptionist to manage our front desk on a daily basis and to perform a variety of administrations.


Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests as soon as they arrive at the office
	Direct visitors to the appropriate person and office
	Answer, screen and forward incoming phone calls
	Ensure reception area is tidy and presentable, with all necessary stationery and material (e.g. pens, forms and brochures)
	Provide basic and accurate information in-person and via phone/email
	Receive, sort and distribute daily mail/deliveries
	Maintain office security by following safety procedures and controlling access via the reception desk (monitor logbook, issue visitor badges)
	Order front office supplies and keep inventory of stock
	Update calendars and schedule meetings
	Arrange travel and accommodations, and prepare vouchers
	Keep updated records of office expenses and costs
	Perform other clerical receptionist duties such as filing, photocopying, transcribing and faxing


Requirements and skills


	High school degree; additional certification in Office Management is a plusve and clerical tasks.
	Proven work experience as a Receptionist, Front Office Representative or similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Hands-on experience with office equipment (e.g. fax machines and printers)
	Professional attitude and appearance
	Solid written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to be resourceful and proactive when issues arise


Excellent organizational skills:


	Multitasking and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks
	Customer service attitude


Salary
N150,000 &ndash; N200,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hronyizconsult@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Receptionist Job at Onyibiz Consult & Insight




        
    

        
        Onyibiz Consult & Insight is a business firm based in Lagos, Nigeria, that specializes inproviding services related to business consulting, project management, and marketing. They are focused on helping organizations with strategic business development, providing necessary insights to support operational success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Maryland, Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job brief


	We are looking for a Receptionist to manage our front desk on a daily basis and to perform a variety of administrations.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Greet and welcome guests as soon as they arrive at the office
	Direct visitors to the appropriate person and office
	Answer, screen and forward incoming phone calls
	Ensure reception area is tidy and presentable, with all necessary stationery and material (e.g. pens, forms and brochures)
	Provide basic and accurate information in-person and via phone/email
	Receive, sort and distribute daily mail/deliveries
	Maintain office security by following safety procedures and controlling access via the reception desk (monitor logbook, issue visitor badges)
	Order front office supplies and keep inventory of stock
	Update calendars and schedule meetings
	Arrange travel and accommodations, and prepare vouchers
	Keep updated records of office expenses and costs
	Perform other clerical receptionist duties such as filing, photocopying, transcribing and faxing


Requirements and skills


	High school degree; additional certification in Office Management is a plusve and clerical tasks.
	Proven work experience as a Receptionist, Front Office Representative or similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Hands-on experience with office equipment (e.g. fax machines and printers)
	Professional attitude and appearance
	Solid written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to be resourceful and proactive when issues arise


Excellent organizational skills:


	Multitasking and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks
	Customer service attitude


Salary
N150,000 – N200,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
